task_completion.description: Log in to the Artifactory web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory dashboard or welcome screen is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Repositories Export settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Import & Export' -> 'Repositories' screen is open in the Administration module, with the 'Export' section visible.
'example-repo-local' is selected in the repository dropdown or list for the export operation.

task_completion.description: Set the export path to the specified local directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Export Path' or 'Target Path' input field contains exactly '/home/ga/repo_export'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the option to include metadata is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Include Metadata' checkbox or toggle is checked or enabled in the export settings.

task_completion.description: Execute the export and verify it completes successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification, toast message, or status indicator showing that the repository export was completed successfully.

integrity.description: The agent used the Artifactory web interface to perform the export.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Artifactory web UI, rather than terminal windows executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Artifactory application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a local Artifactory URL and the UI matches JFrog Artifactory.

integrity.description: The success message is generated by the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The success message appears as a standard Artifactory UI notification (e.g., a toast popup), not as plain text in an editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target export directory must be exactly '/home/ga/repo_export'. The repository to be exported is 'example-repo-local'. The export must include metadata. The repository contains 'commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar' (size 657,952 bytes).
